description:
A junior configuration manager left two basic config files under 
/home/user/project/config/ that need quick edits and documentation.

1. Verify that the two **already-existing** files have the exact initial
   contents shown below before you start.  
   • /home/user/project/config/app.yaml  
   • /home/user/project/config/database.toml

2. Apply the specific changes listed in “Required edits”.  
   You may use any terminal-based technique you like (sed, echo, redirection,
   CLI YAML/TOML tools, a text editor, etc.).

3. After the edits, create a human-readable text change log called  
   /home/user/project/config/change_log.txt that captures every change you
   made.  The automated test will read this file verbatim, so make sure the
   formatting rules are followed **exactly**.

────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

Initial file contents
---------------------
/home/user/project/config/app.yaml
----------------------------------
name: SampleApp
version: 1.2.3
settings:
  debug: false
  max_connections: 50

/home/user/project/config/database.toml
---------------------------------------
[database]
host = "localhost"
port = 5432
user = "appuser"
password = "secret"
timeout = 30

────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

Required edits
--------------
1. app.yaml  
   • Change settings.debug from false to true  
   • Change settings.max_connections from 50 to 100  
   • Add a new key settings.feature_flag with the value beta

2. database.toml  
   • Change database.host from "localhost" to "db.internal.local"  
   • Change database.timeout from 30 to 45  
   • Append an entirely new table:  
       [replica]  
       host = "db-replica.internal.local"  
       port = 5433

────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

Exact final file expectations
-----------------------------
After you are done, **the files must look precisely like this** (indentation,
quotes and spacing count):

/home/user/project/config/app.yaml
----------------------------------
name: SampleApp
version: 1.2.3
settings:
  debug: true
  max_connections: 100
  feature_flag: beta

/home/user/project/config/database.toml
---------------------------------------
[database]
host = "db.internal.local"
port = 5432
user = "appuser"
password = "secret"
timeout = 45

[replica]
host = "db-replica.internal.local"
port = 5433

────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

Mandatory change_log.txt format
-------------------------------
Create /home/user/project/config/change_log.txt with **exactly** the 12 lines
shown below (no extra spaces, no trailing whitespace).  Each edited file is
listed once, followed by indented bullet lines for every individual field
you touched.  New keys/tables count as “(added)”.  Use arrows (->) surrounded
by single spaces.

app.yaml:
  settings.debug: false -> true
  settings.max_connections: 50 -> 100
  settings.feature_flag: (added) -> beta
database.toml:
  database.host: localhost -> db.internal.local
  database.timeout: 30 -> 45
  replica.host: (added) -> db-replica.internal.local
  replica.port: (added) -> 5433

────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

Success criteria
----------------
• app.yaml and database.toml exactly match the “Exact final file expectations”
  block (verified byte-for-byte).  
• change_log.txt exists at the stated path and consists of exactly the 12
  lines specified above.  
• No additional files are created inside /home/user/project/config/.  
• All commands run without sudo.  
• Keep file permissions unchanged (they should remain regular user-writable).
truth:
Initial directory that exists before task starts:
/home/user/project/config/

Initial files and contents before agent begins:

1. /home/user/project/config/app.yaml
-------------------------------------
name: SampleApp
version: 1.2.3
settings:
  debug: false
  max_connections: 50

2. /home/user/project/config/database.toml
------------------------------------------
[database]
host = "localhost"
port = 5432
user = "appuser"
password = "secret"
timeout = 30

No change_log.txt is present initially.

Expected final state after agent finishes:

1. /home/user/project/config/app.yaml
-------------------------------------
name: SampleApp
version: 1.2.3
settings:
  debug: true
  max_connections: 100
  feature_flag: beta

2. /home/user/project/config/database.toml
------------------------------------------
[database]
host = "db.internal.local"
port = 5432
user = "appuser"
password = "secret"
timeout = 45

[replica]
host = "db-replica.internal.local"
port = 5433

3. /home/user/project/config/change_log.txt
-------------------------------------------
app.yaml:
  settings.debug: false -> true
  settings.max_connections: 50 -> 100
  settings.feature_flag: (added) -> beta
database.toml:
  database.host: localhost -> db.internal.local
  database.timeout: 30 -> 45
  replica.host: (added) -> db-replica.internal.local
  replica.port: (added) -> 5433

All files should be regular files owned by user:user with default 644
permissions. No other new files should exist inside
/home/user/project/config/.
